title: Home Screen - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog not displayed over DFU screens when new device connects during active firmware update on Voyager Free 60/60+/20
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure no device is connected.
2. Connect a device that supports onboarding (e.g., Voyager Free 60, Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 20) that has a pending DFU update.
3. Observe that the DFU process begins automatically or manually initiate the DFU update.
4. While the DFU is in progress, disconnect and reconnect the same device (or connect another onboarding-capable device).
6. Navigate to the Home screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe whether the onboarding dialog is displayed.
expected: The onboarding dialog should be displayed on the Home screen after the DFU completes and the user returns to the Home screen.
